trigger: Three schema-shape drifts caught by post-pair validation across units: U01 debrief.acceptance_self_check written as strings; U04 verify.defects missing required 'criterion'; U06 verify_p2/p3 premise_check with invented key names.
lesson: Subagents reliably fill VALUES but drift on nested REQUIRED KEY NAMES when a JSON artifact's shape is described in prose; the drift concentrates in nested objects (defects[], premise_check, acceptance_self_check).
how_to_apply: When your unit writes any schema-validated JSON artifact, copy the key names EXACTLY from the shape spec in your brief/prompt — especially nested objects — and re-read your written file once to check every required key name letter-for-letter before finishing. Never invent synonyms (executor_premise != executor_premise_quoted).
evidence: PROGRESS.md entries 15:12 / 17:25 / 19:4x; validator FAIL lines for units/U01/debrief.json, units/U04/verify.json, units/U06/verify_p2.json+verify_p3.json.
